title: Spicy Greek Chicken Skewers
description: Tender chicken skewers marinated in a blend of Greek herbs and spices, grilled to perfection. Perfect for a quick and flavorful summer dinner.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine lemon juice, yogurt, oregano, parsley, and chili flakes. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together marinade and chicken pieces. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
